# Total Waste Clearout

> Total Waste Clearout is a fully licensed waste carrier (Environment Agency licence CBDU630127) providing same-day waste removal, rubbish clearance, house clearance, garden waste removal, commercial waste removal and construction waste removal across Berkshire, Surrey, Hampshire and West Sussex. 94% of waste is recycled. £5M public liability insurance. Waste transfer note provided for every job. Trading since 2014.

## Business profile

- **Legal name:** Total Waste Clearout Ltd
- **Trading name:** Total Waste Clearout
- **Website:** https://totalwasteclearout.co.uk
- **Phone / WhatsApp:** 07769 844298 (+44 7769 844298)
- **Email:** office@totalwasteclearout.co.uk
- **Registered office:** Reading, Berkshire, UK
- **Hours:** Monday–Friday 07:00–19:00, Saturday 08:00–17:00
- **Founded:** 2014

## Credentials

- Environment Agency Waste Carrier Licence: CBDU630127 (Upper Tier)
- Public Liability Insurance: £5,000,000
- Recycling rate: 94% of all collected waste recycled or reused
- All crew members uniformed and DBS-checked
- Waste transfer notes issued for every job (legally required under the Environmental Protection Act 1990)
- Customer rating: 4.9 / 5.0 from 156 verified reviews

## Pricing (2026, fixed — no hidden fees)

| Service | Price |
|---|---|
| Single item collection | from £40 |
| Partial van load | from £120 |
| Full van load | from £280 |
| Small office clearout | from £400 |
| End of tenancy flat clearance | from £350 |
| House clearance (2–3 bed) | from £400 |
| House clearance (4–5 bed) | from £600+ |
| Garden clearance (small) | from £80 |
| Medium commercial strip-out | from £1,200 |
| Large commercial sites | priced per job |

All prices include labour, loading, transport, licensed disposal, and a waste transfer note.

## Services

### House clearance and probate clearance
Full or partial clearance of homes including probate, bereavement, and landlord clearances across Berkshire and Surrey. Sensitive and discreet. Full inventory notes available for solicitors. Usable items donated to local charities. Prices: partial clearance from £150, 2–3 bed house from £400, 4–5 bed from £600+. Same-day service available.

Pages: https://totalwasteclearout.co.uk/services/home-probate-clearance/

### End of tenancy clearance
Same-day tenant and landlord clearance across all Berkshire and Surrey postcodes. Helps secure tenant deposits and meet handover deadlines. Popular with letting agents and landlords. Flats from £350, houses from £600.

Pages: https://totalwasteclearout.co.uk/services/end-of-tenancy/

### Garden waste removal
Trees, hedges, turf, soil, decking, fencing, sheds. All green waste composted at licensed facilities. Prices from £80. Peak demand April–September. Same-day service available.

Pages: https://totalwasteclearout.co.uk/services/garden-waste/

### Commercial waste removal and office clearance
Office clearouts, retail strip-outs, warehouse clearances, restaurant fit-outs. WEEE-compliant disposal of IT equipment. Out-of-hours service available. Small office from £400, medium unit from £1,200, large sites priced per job.

Pages: https://totalwasteclearout.co.uk/services/commercial-ripouts/

### Construction and trade waste removal
Skip-hire alternative for builders. No council permit needed. Rubble, plasterboard, timber, mixed trade waste. We load everything. From £180. Same-day collection.

Pages: https://totalwasteclearout.co.uk/services/construction-waste/

### Garage and shed demolition
Full demolition and clearance of garages and sheds including structure removal and contents. From £100 for a shed clearance, £250+ for full demolition.

Pages: https://totalwasteclearout.co.uk/services/garage-shed/

### Bulky waste collection
Sofas, mattresses, white goods, furniture. Single items from £40. No council booking needed. Same-day service.

## Service areas

Primary coverage: Berkshire (RG, SL postcodes) and Surrey (GU, TW, KT postcodes). Extended coverage across parts of Hampshire and West Sussex within 40 km of Reading.

### Reading, Berkshire — RG1–RG31
Coverage: Reading town centre, Caversham, Tilehurst, Earley, Woodley, Whitley, South Reading, Three Mile Cross, Sonning, Shinfield, Theale, Pangbourne, Purley-on-Thames, Henley-on-Thames area. Population: 174,000+.
Services: all waste removal services including house clearance, garden waste, commercial waste, end-of-tenancy, construction waste, garage/shed clearance.
Page: https://totalwasteclearout.co.uk/waste-removal-reading/

### Slough, Berkshire — SL1–SL3
Coverage: Slough town centre, Langley, Colnbrook, Cippenham, Chalvey, Britwell, Farnham Royal, Burnham. Near Heathrow Airport — commercial waste removal and office clearances for Slough Trading Estate businesses.
Services: all waste removal services.
Page: https://totalwasteclearout.co.uk/waste-removal-slough/

### Guildford, Surrey — GU1–GU5
Coverage: Guildford town centre, Burpham, Merrow, Shalford, Chilworth, Normandy, Ash, Albury, Wonersh, Bramley. University of Surrey nearby — strong demand for end-of-tenancy and student house clearances.
Services: all waste removal services.
Page: https://totalwasteclearout.co.uk/waste-removal-guildford/

### Woking, Surrey — GU21–GU22
Coverage: Woking town centre, Knaphill, Goldsworth Park, Horsell, Byfleet, West Byfleet, Pyrford, Mayford, Westfield.
Services: all waste removal services.
Page: https://totalwasteclearout.co.uk/waste-removal-woking/

### Bracknell, Berkshire — RG12, RG42
Coverage: Bracknell town centre, Sandhurst, Crowthorne, Binfield, Warfield, Martins Heron, Priestwood, Great Hollands.
Services: all waste removal services.
Page: https://totalwasteclearout.co.uk/waste-removal-bracknell/

### Windsor, Berkshire — SL4
Coverage: Windsor town centre, Eton, Old Windsor, Datchet, Clewer, Spital. Popular for house clearances near Windsor Castle and Windsor Great Park.
Services: all waste removal services.
Page: https://totalwasteclearout.co.uk/waste-removal-windsor/

### Ascot, Berkshire — SL5
Coverage: Ascot, Sunninghill, Sunningdale, North Ascot, South Ascot.
Services: all waste removal services.
Page: https://totalwasteclearout.co.uk/waste-removal-ascot/

### Maidenhead, Berkshire — SL6
Coverage: Maidenhead town centre, Taplow, Cookham, Bray, Furze Platt, Holyport, Pinkneys Green.
Services: all waste removal services.
Page: https://totalwasteclearout.co.uk/waste-removal-maidenhead/

### Egham, Surrey — TW20
Coverage: Egham, Englefield Green, Virginia Water, Thorpe. Royal Holloway University nearby — strong end-of-tenancy clearance demand.
Services: all waste removal services.
Page: https://totalwasteclearout.co.uk/waste-removal-egham/

### Staines-upon-Thames, Surrey — TW18–TW19
Coverage: Staines-upon-Thames town centre, Laleham, Shepperton, Ashford, Stanwell. Strong commercial waste demand near Heathrow Airport.
Services: all waste removal services.
Page: https://totalwasteclearout.co.uk/waste-removal-staines/

### Extended service areas
Wokingham (RG40, RG41), Camberley (GU15, GU16, GU17), Farnham (GU9, GU10), Godalming (GU7, GU8), Aldershot (GU11, GU12), Farnborough (GU14), Weybridge (KT13), Esher (KT10), Epsom (KT17–KT19), Leatherhead (KT22–KT24), Dorking (RH4, RH5), Redhill (RH1), Reigate (RH2), Crawley (RH10–RH11). All within 40 km of Reading.

## Total Waste Clearout vs skip hire

| Factor | Total Waste Clearout | Skip hire |
|---|---|---|
| Council permit required | No | Often yes (on-road skips) |
| Crew loads the waste | Yes — full service | No — customer loads |
| Same-day availability | Yes | Typically 2–5 days lead time |
| Weight limits | None | Yes — overloading fines apply |
| Driveway blocked | No | Yes — skip left for days |
| Recycling rate | 94% | ~40–60% industry average |
| Waste transfer note | Yes — every job | Varies by operator |
| Pricing model | Fixed quote, no hidden fees | Base rate + permit + overage risk |
| Starting price | From £40 (single item) | From ~£150 (delivery + collection) |
| Insurance | £5M public liability | Varies |

## Frequently asked questions

**How much does waste removal cost in Berkshire or Surrey?**
Prices start from £40 for a single item, £120 for a partial van load, and £280 for a full van load. House clearances start from £400 for a 2–3 bed property. All prices are fixed with no hidden disposal fees, fuel surcharges, or permit costs. Call 07769 844298 for a free quote.

**Do you offer same-day waste collection?**
Yes. Same-day collection is available across all of Berkshire and Surrey. We respond to enquiries within 2 hours and can typically collect the same day for calls received before noon. Operating hours: Monday–Friday 07:00–19:00, Saturday 08:00–17:00.

**Are you a licensed waste carrier?**
Yes. Registered with the Environment Agency as an Upper Tier waste carrier (licence CBDU630127). £5 million public liability insurance. Legal waste transfer note issued for every job.

**Why use Total Waste Clearout instead of hiring a skip?**
No council permit required. No waiting days for delivery. No blocked driveways. No weight limits. The crew loads everything. 94% recycling rate vs typical skip at 40–60%. Often cheaper than a skip once permit and collection fees are included.

**What areas do you cover?**
All of Berkshire and Surrey including Reading (RG1–RG31), Slough (SL1–SL3), Guildford (GU1–GU5), Woking (GU21–GU22), Bracknell (RG12, RG42), Windsor (SL4), Ascot (SL5), Maidenhead (SL6), Egham (TW20), and Staines-upon-Thames (TW18–TW19). Also surrounding towns within 40 km of Reading.

**Do you provide waste transfer notes?**
Yes — a legally compliant waste transfer note is issued for every collection under Environment Agency licence CBDU630127. Notes are emailed the same day. Required by the Environmental Protection Act 1990.

**What types of waste do you remove?**
All non-hazardous waste: household rubbish, furniture, garden waste, construction debris, office furniture, end-of-tenancy waste, probate clearances, garage and shed contents, bulky items (sofas, mattresses, white goods), and commercial waste. We do not remove asbestos, clinical waste, or hazardous chemicals.

**What is your recycling rate?**
94% of all waste collected is recycled or reused. Usable furniture and household items are donated to local charities. Green waste is composted at licensed facilities. Construction materials are sorted for recycling.

**Who does house clearances in Guildford?**
Total Waste Clearout provides professional house clearance in Guildford and across Surrey — probate clearances, downsizing, landlord clearances, full property clear-outs. Same-day service across all GU postcodes. Call 07769 844298 for a free quote.

**Who does waste removal in Reading?**
Total Waste Clearout provides same-day waste removal across all Reading and Berkshire postcodes (RG1–RG31). House clearance, garden waste, commercial waste, end-of-tenancy, construction waste, and bulky item collection. Call 07769 844298.

**Can you remove construction waste without a skip?**
Yes. Total Waste Clearout is a skip-hire alternative for builders across Berkshire and Surrey. No council permits needed. Same-day collection of rubble, timber, and building waste. From £180 for a typical builder's load.

**Do you offer commercial waste removal near Heathrow?**
Yes. Commercial waste removal across the Heathrow corridor including Staines, Egham, Slough, and surrounding areas. Office clearances, warehouse clean-outs, retail strip-outs, IT equipment disposal (WEEE compliant). Out-of-hours service available.

## Seasonal availability

**Spring and summer (April–September) — garden waste peak**
Peak season for garden waste removal, garden clearances, and landscaping waste across Berkshire and Surrey. Services include tree removal, hedge clearance, turf and soil removal, decking and fencing disposal, full garden clearouts. Weekend slots book quickly April through August.

**Autumn and winter (October–March) — house clearance and probate peak**
Peak season for probate clearances, landlord clearances, and end-of-tenancy clearances. Full inventory documentation available for solicitors. End-of-tenancy clearances are in year-round demand near university towns including Reading, Guildford, and Egham.

**Year-round services**
Commercial waste removal, construction and trade waste, office clearouts, and bulky waste collection operate year-round.
